title: Add image fields to libpod database
body: This allows us to accurately trigger OCI hooks that trigger on the presence of volume mounts.

comments.body: @wking This should resolve the issues with hooks and volumes - you can check against this config bool to see if we have non-default volume mounts

Oh, I think you should also update [the consumer][1] to use the new property.

[1]: https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/blob/9a2e267637beeb535aac08aee99bcf24db5fce61/libpod/container_internal.go#L1146
Pushed an update to fix comments throughout options.go and change hooks to use the new volume handling

Hold off on merging this for a few hours, talking with @baude about whether we should expand this from just a bool to an actual array representing the user-added volumes so we can include them in images we commit as well.
Alright, changed away from just a bool to storing the actual user volumes themselves (as well as Entrypoint and Command) so we can use them in Commit.
Update the PR title now that the implementation isn't using a `bool`?
